title: nephrodium proliferum
intro: Nephrodium proliferum, also known as the Button Fern or Nephrolepis, is a species of fern in the genus Nephrolepis. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Nephrodium proliferum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as treating digestive issues and fever. Nephrodium proliferum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
